items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and d…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问:你有什么期望? "嗯,很难知道. 我想除了Mercedes 现在每个人都有点上下下 它们在最前线是一种不断的挑战。 奥地利对我们来说有点难以理解。 在比赛中,我们觉得会更强大 也许我们会更糟糕 Ferrari 我们以为星期天比他们强得多 雷德布尔或马克思至少比我们想象的要快得多 从赛道到赛道的升级, 读起来很困难 但我觉得我们应该在前面的某个地方 我不知道具体在哪 但我们仍然错过了最后一步 真正挑战胜利。 只要我们把最好的脚向前走,我想我们是在竞选希望的讲台,但我们必须知道!"
items.summary: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and down at the moment apart from Mercedes. They're kind of a constant challenge at the very front. Austria was a little bit hard to read for us. Qualifying we thought we'd be a bit stronger, in the race maybe we thought we'd be a bit worse. Ferrari we thought would be quite a lot stronger on Sunday than they were. Redbull or Max at least, was a lot quicker than we thought he'd be. It's changing a lot at the moment from track to track with upgrades for everybody. Difficult to read but I think we should be somewhere at the front, where exactly, I don't know. But we're still missing that final step to really challenge for wins. As long as we put our best foot forward, I think we're in the running for hopefully podiums, but we'll have to find out!"
items.summary_zh: 问:你有什么期望? "嗯,很难知道. 我想除了Mercedes 现在每个人都有点上下下 它们在最前线是一种不断的挑战。 奥地利对我们来说有点难以理解。 在比赛中,我们觉得会更强大 也许我们会更糟糕 Ferrari 我们以为星期天比他们强得多 雷德布尔或马克思至少比我们想象的要快得多 从赛道到赛道的升级, 读起来很困难 但我觉得我们应该在前面的某个地方 我不知道具体在哪 但我们仍然错过了最后一步 真正挑战胜利。 只要我们把最好的脚向前走,我想我们是在竞选希望的讲台,但我们必须知道!"

items.title: X repost from @laurogeitabat: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much t…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @laurogeitabat：Oscar被问到最大谣言,以及这对他意味着什么:"这对我没有什么意义. 马克思显然不需要多谈论他的才华. 我有一个合同。 我多次得到保证,球队对我非常满意,对球队也非常满意. 对我来说,我很高兴我在哪里, 很高兴我的处境 并且只是试图继续我们在过去的几年中的成功。"
items.summary: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much to me. Max obviously doesn't need to be spoken about much in terms of his talent. I've got a contract in place. I've had multiple reassurances that the team are very happy with me and I'm very happy with the team. For me I'm very happy where I am, happy with the situation I'm in and just trying to continue the success we've had in the last few years."
items.summary_zh: Oscar被问到最大谣言,以及这对他意味着什么:"这对我没有什么意义. 马克思显然不需要多谈论他的才华. 我有一个合同。 我多次得到保证,球队对我非常满意,对球队也非常满意. 对我来说,我很高兴我在哪里, 很高兴我的处境 并且只是试图继续我们在过去的几年中的成功。"

items.summary: oscar was asked (again 🙄) about the max & mclaren rumours: "for me, it doesn't mean much. i'm very happy with where i am. i've been told multiple times that the team are happy with me and i trust them. a contract is in place. i'm just trying to build on the success i've had." https://t.co/TYsMIoUYdB

items.summary: 1) thermal shift (by nick thomm) - inspired by the energy, thermal dynamics and motion of racing 2) phase grid (by j. demsky) - inspired by movement and transformation 3) velocity (by david nott) - inspired by oscar's driving style, speed, momentum and precision
items.summary_zh: 1) 热移(由nick Thomm所引出) ——受赛车2)相相格(由j. demsky所引出) ——受运动和变相所引出(由david Nott所引出) 速度(由david Nott所引出) ——受Oscar驾驶风格,速度,动力和精度所引出.
